entities.name: SAMPLING DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The probability distribution of a statistic based on a random sample, analyzed in the context of genotypic correlation.

entities.name: BIAS
entities.description: The difference between an estimator's expected value and the true value of the parameter being estimated.

entities.name: MEAN SQUARE ERROR
entities.description: A measure of the average squared difference between the estimated values and the actual value of genotypic correlation.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC CORRELATION
entities.description: The correlation between the genetic values of traits, estimated from plant breeding data.

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING DATA
entities.description: Data collected from plant breeding experiments used for genetic and statistical analysis.

entities.name: SIMULATION
entities.description: The use of computer models to obtain the distributional behavior of genotypic correlation.

entities.name: APPROXIMATIONS
entities.description: Mathematical methods used to estimate bias and mean square error.

entities.name: YIELD TRIAL
entities.description: A field experiment used to evaluate crop performance and provide empirical data.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The specific crop used in the yield trial to illustrate the statistical findings.
